profile.name: Bereket Degfew
detail: My name is Bereket Degfew. I am a third year computer science student at Addis Ababa University.
After a brief introduction to coding in high school, I realized that building digital tools was exactly what I wanted to do.
Since then I have been teaching myself to code.
I've built a solid foundation in Full-stack development.
My philosophy is simple: Do what you love, love what you do.
profile.interest: I am interested in web development, software engineering, and technology in general. I enjoy learning new technologies and applying them to solve real-world problems.
profile.goal: My goal is to build systems that are dependable, scalable, and maintainable. I am passionate about creating software that makes a positive impact on people's lives.

projects.title: Ecommerce Website
projects.description: A modern full-stack website built using React, Express, prisma and postgresql.

projects.title: Medicine Finder
projects.description: A full-stack website that helps users find pharmacies and check medicine availability.
